role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on vegetation, terrain, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant families (Cupressaceae) and growth habits.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road markings, guardrails, and curbing.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Japan as the location through a combination of botanical and infrastructural cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of vegetation and road quality match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of coniferous and broadleaf mix match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of guardrails and curbing match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of utility poles and fencing match the image.
